h75461a43geefbg46ecga07cgb813ee3c7136: Don't this stupid human know any good goblin warsongs?
h655c400eg670dg4634g9289g233c62052533: My rat sings better than him!
h2bdd2addgf4cbg4a1fgb02dgbec6409a1007: You goin' on the next raid? Bring me back sumfin' pretty
h8a746f00g9638g4c24g87cfg265b0bb704ea: Get off yer arse and do yer own killin'!
h7bb6db29g88a8g4303ga303g7e25259632eb: Aw, come on. I'm wounded! That wizard burnt me sumfin' proper.
h90376bdaga01dg4dbbg8e4eg5c4a45765720: For the last time, that weren't a wizard. It was a bloke with a torch!
h26db24f2g67d6g413dgb531gc16eb051ef83: Wozzat...? I think I 'eard the Absolute's voice just now.
h080c4236g8a07g47cegb611g276b0751be5c: That's the drink talkin'. Absolute wouldn't speak to a worm like you.
hfc5448ffgbcf1g4a7fgbfbcg7da7f3a2a189: Gotta be chosen to hear Her. Like the boss an' priestess.
h5d0fc227gab89g4ffbg9a7eg4f7a3465f52e: Humans ain't good for much, but they make tasty beer.
he6a1213bgaaacg4b7cg8ad1gaabf500b433b: Tastes even better when you nick it outta their cold, dead 'ands.
